testcase.name: QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle offline submission and queue ticket locally
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should retry on transient network failures
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle API timeout gracefully
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle microphone permission denied
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle camera permission denied for photo upload
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle no speech detected error
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle transcription API failure
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle SpeechRecognition API unavailable
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should validate phone number format on phone gate
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle very long issue descriptions
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle special characters in input
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle empty/whitespace-only submission
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle corrupted image file
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle very large image file (>50MB)
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle storage upload failure
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle rapid form submissions
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle language change during submission
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle localStorage quota exceeded
testcase.system-err: (node:63310) ExperimentalWarning: localStorage is not available because --localstorage-file was not provided.

testcase.name: QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle speechSynthesis API failure
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle back button during phone gate
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should persist reporter phone across page reload
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle machine details fetch failure
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle duplicate check failure gracefully
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle ticket log failure with fallback
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle rapid language switches without state corruption
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle zero-width screen edge case
